scripts.format:shell: shfmt -w -i 2 -ci -sr batch/batch-runner.sh batch/test-fixtures/mock-codex-exec.sh scripts/analyze-project.sh scripts/run-scheduled-scan.sh scripts/ux.sh
scripts.format:shell:check: shfmt -d -i 2 -ci -sr batch/batch-runner.sh batch/test-fixtures/mock-codex-exec.sh scripts/analyze-project.sh scripts/run-scheduled-scan.sh scripts/ux.sh
scripts.lint: biome lint scripts && npm run lint:shell
scripts.lint:shell: shellcheck batch/batch-runner.sh batch/test-fixtures/mock-codex-exec.sh scripts/analyze-project.sh scripts/run-scheduled-scan.sh scripts/ux.sh
scripts.coverage:dashboard: cd dashboard && go test ./... -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out
scripts.coverage:dashboard:html: cd dashboard && go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o coverage.html
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:node && npm run coverage:dashboard
